creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Removing Simon from feedback as he doesn't maintain any of the www/drupal6-* modules, leaving him in CC. The following modules are without a maintainer and require a patch:

* www/drupal6-chaos
* www/drupal6-ckeditor
* www/drupal6-content_access
* www/drupal6-google_analytics
* www/drupal6-image
* www/drupal6-imce
* www/drupal6-menu_block
* www/drupal6-mimedetect
* www/drupal6-nice_menus
* www/drupal6-nodewords
* www/drupal6-page_title
* www/drupal6-panels
* www/drupal6-path_redirect
* www/drupal6-pathauto
* www/drupal6-seo_checklist
* www/drupal6-services
* www/drupal6-token
* www/drupal6-webform
* www/drupal6-wysiwyg
* www/drupal6-zeropoint
